title: cyperus pumilus
intro: Cyperus pumilus, also known as Dwarf Papyrus or Small-flower Sedge, is a species of sedge that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus pumilus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and soothe digestive issues. Cyperus pumilus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
